name: J.K. Rowling

acts.description: Repeatedly published statements characterized by trans activists and many LGBT organizations as transphobic, including opposition to legal gender self-identification

behavior_summary: Author of Harry Potter has become a prominent public figure in debates around transgender rights, taking positions that most major LGBT organizations and medical bodies consider harmful to trans people.

art.summary: Harry Potter is the best-selling book series in history. Revitalized children's reading. Defined a generation's cultural imagination.

verdict.blurb: She gave a generation its mythology and has spent recent years making trans people's lives measurably harder. Every Hogwarts game purchased, every reread, enriches someone who is actively campaigning against the rights of a vulnerable group. The books are still the books. She's still her.
